src: Howtrader: A crypto quant framework for developing, backtesting, and executing your own trading strategies. Seamlessly integrates with TradingView and other third-party signals. Simply send a post request to automate trading and order placement. Supports Binance and Okex exchanges.
ja: Howtrader: 暗号資産向けのクオンツフレームワーク。取引戦略の開発・バックテスト・実行に対応。TradingViewなど外部シグナルとシームレスに連携し、POSTリクエストで自動売買を実現。Binance、Okexに対応
